Types

CodeGen {.acyclic.} = object
  case
  of gkToplevel:
    nil
  of gkProc, gkBlockProc:
  of gkIterator:
a code generator for a module or proc.

Procs

proc genScript(gen: var CodeGen; program: Ast; includePath: Option[string];
               isMainScript: static bool = false;
               isSnippet: static bool = false;
               withReturnStmt: static bool = true): Rope
proc initCodeGen(script: Script; module: Module; chunk: Chunk; kind = gkToplevel): CodeGen {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc minifyInlineJs(js: sink string): owned string {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
proc minifyRawHtml(code: sink string; res: var string) {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
